title: euonymus radicans var. minimus
intro: Euonymus radicans var. minimus, also known as compact or dwarf English ivy, is a woody-stemmed, evergreen climber or groundcover native to Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Euonymus radicans var. minimus are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, or used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
